# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NODE_ENV: development
      PIP_CACHE_DIR: ~/.cache/pip
      CONFIG_DIR: .config
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Cache Node dependencies and build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            dist
            build
            .next
            .cache
            ${{ env.CONFIG_DIR }}
            config
            config/*.json
            config/*.yml
            config/*.yaml
            configs
            configs/${{ github.ref_name }}
            configs/${{ github.event_name }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json', 'package.json', '.nvmrc', '.node-version', 'config/**', 'configs/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache Python packages and build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
            venv
            build
            dist
            .pytest_cache
            ${{ env.CONFIG_DIR }}
            config
            config/*.ini
            config/*.cfg
            config/*.toml
            configs
            configs/${{ github.ref_name }}
            configs/${{ github.event_name }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt', 'pyproject.toml', 'Pipfile.lock', 'poetry.lock', 'setup.py', 'setup.cfg', 'config/**', 'configs/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then pip install .; fi

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Test
        run: |
          npm test
          if [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -d tests ]; then pytest; fi
